name: Smurfit-Stone Container Corporation
description: Smurfit-Stone Container Corporation was a prominent global manufacturer of paperboard and paper-based packaging products, including containerboard, corrugated containers, folding cartons, and paper bags. Formed in 1998 through the merger of Stone Container Corporation and Jefferson Smurfit Corporation, the company operated as a leader in the industry with integrated manufacturing processes from raw materials to finished goods. Headquartered in Creve Coeur, Missouri, and Chicago, Illinois, the company played a significant role in the packaging and recycling sectors before being acquired by Rock-Tenn Company in 2011, which later became part of WestRock.
